holdings.infoBox: DUKQ is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings. The top holdings are Schwab U.S. Large-Cap ETF stock at 24.36%, Invesco NASDAQ 100 ETF at 19.69%, Schwab U.S. Mid-Cap ETF at 10.13%, Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight ETF at 10.00%, and Invesco S&P 500 Momentum ETF at 5.18%.

overview.description: The Ocean Park Domestic ETF (DUKQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that tactically allocates across US equity ETFs. The fund seeks to provide total return while mitigating downside risk. DUKQ was launched on Jul 10, 2024 and is issued by Ocean Park.
